summary: Enterprise Hotel Operating System - 3 new strategic modules fully tested: Revenue Management Engine, Real-Time Operational Event System, Guest Journey Layer. All 27 backend pytest tests pass. All 3 frontend dashboards load and function correctly with proper data display and tab navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Revenue Management Engine properly implements dynamic pricing with demand-based multipliers (0.8x to 1.35x)
Event Bus uses priority-based notification rules with proper role targeting
Guest Journey Service implements complete guest lifecycle management
All 3 routers properly use authentication via get_current_user dependency
MongoDB ObjectId correctly excluded from all responses
Turkish language used for UI labels as specified

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 dashboards load with correct KPIs, tabs, and data)

seed_data_creation: Event system has published test events visible in live feed
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 enterprise modules fully functional: /revenue-engine, /operational-events, /guest-journey. All visible in navigation. Backend APIs at /api/revenue-engine/*, /api/event-system/*, /api/guest-journey/*. Event system auto-refreshes every 30s.

backend_pytest_27_tests: test_revenue_dashboard - GET /api/revenue-engine/dashboard returns period_30d, daily_trend, opportunities
test_rate_suggestions - GET /api/revenue-engine/rate-suggestions returns 7 days of suggestions
test_yield_recommendations - GET /api/revenue-engine/yield-recommendations returns stop_sell, min_stay, cta, ctd
test_apply_rate - POST /api/revenue-engine/apply-rate successfully applies rate override
test_publish_unknown_event - Rejects unknown event types with 400
test_unread_count - GET /api/event-system/unread-count returns total_unread, critical counts
test_mark_read - POST /api/event-system/mark-read marks events as read
test_guest_request_invalid_type - Returns 400 for invalid request type
frontend_playwright_tests: Revenue Engine 4 KPI cards: ADR, RevPAR, Occupancy, Total Revenue
Revenue Engine tabs work: Genel Bakis, Tahmin, Yield Kurallari, Kanal Analizi
Revenue Engine rate suggestions table with 7 days + Apply button
Event system stat cards: Critical, High, Total (24s), Unack Kritik
Event system tabs: Canli Akis, Front Desk Kuyrugu, Housekeeping Board, Istatistikler
Event system live feed shows published events with priority indicators
Guest Journey 5 KPI cards: Acik Talepler, Ort. Cozum, Bugun Varislar, Online Check-in, Ort. Puan
Guest Journey tabs: Ozet, Talepler, Mesajlasma, Degerlendirmeler
Guest Journey messaging templates display 5 templates correctly
Navigation bar shows all 3 new modules: Revenue Engine, PMS Operations, Guest Journey
